redis.clients.jedis

Class JedisSentinelPool

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.commons.pool2.BaseObject
      • org.apache.commons.pool2.impl.BaseGenericObjectPool<T>
        • org.apache.commons.pool2.impl.GenericObjectPool<T>
          • redis.clients.jedis.util.Pool<Jedis>
            • redis.clients.jedis.JedisSentinelPool
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Closeable, AutoCloseable, org.apache.commons.pool2.impl.GenericObjectPoolMXBean, org.apache.commons.pool2.ObjectPool<Jedis>, org.apache.commons.pool2.UsageTracking<Jedis>

    public class JedisSentinelPool
extends Pool<Jedis>
